title: ncurses bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[6.2-12.20210508]
- remove execute permissions from ANNOUNCE file (RHEL-101067)

[6.2-11.20210508]
- guard against corrupt terminfo data in string conversion (CVE-2022-29458
  RHEL-100135)
full_text:
[6.2-12.20210508]
- remove execute permissions from ANNOUNCE file (RHEL-101067)

[6.2-11.20210508]
- guard against corrupt terminfo data in string conversion (CVE-2022-29458
  RHEL-100135)
